    last_name = of_Hanover

    culture = cu:north_german

    commander_rank = default

    is_general = yes

        arrogant
        cautious

    commander_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            exists = c:GBR
            c:GBR ?= THIS
            c:GBR ?= { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }

        role = general
        earliest_usage_date = 1854.1.4
        latest_usage_date = 1904.1.1
        chance = 50

}
